title: Total Digestion of Marine Particles
author: Paulina Pinedo
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.f3wbqpe

steps.title: Place filter into PFA vial, ideally...
steps.instruction: Place filter into PFA vial, ideally with sample side facing downwards or folded inwards.

steps.title: Add 1
steps.instruction: Add 1.5 mL of sulfuric acid to all samples and blanks

steps.title: Place lid atop loosely and leave...
steps.instruction: Place lid atop loosely and leave filter to soak for 20 min at room temperature

steps.title: Lift lid slightly to add 0
steps.instruction: Lift lid slightly to add 0.5mL of hydrogen peroxide.

steps.title: React for 60 min in a...
steps.instruction: React for 60 min in a hot plate at 110˚C with lid placed on loosely

steps.title: Add another 0
steps.instruction: Add another 0.5 mL peroxide, replace caps loosely and increase hotplate temperature to 200˚C

steps.title: If undissolved filter pieces or semi-digested...
steps.instruction: If undissolved filter pieces or semi-digested viscous material persist, let it cool down and add 100-200µL aliquots of peroxide to digest this material

steps.title: Dry vial contents at 235-250˚C Note
steps.instruction: Dry vial contents at 235-250˚C Note: If a small droplet of sulfuric acid remains at this point, let vial cool and suspend contents in a small aliquot of Milli-Q water or 8N nitric acid and re-dry at 235˚C until the droplet is removed.

steps.title: Resuspend dried samples in 2 mL...
steps.instruction: Resuspend dried samples in 2 mL of a freshly prepared mixture of HNO 3 , HCl, and HF acids (4M each) in milli-Q water.

steps.title: Let vials cool to room temperature,...
steps.instruction: Let vials cool to room temperature, uncap and dry at 100-110˚C (overnight).

steps.title: Add 2mL of freshly prepared 50%...
steps.instruction: Add 2mL of freshly prepared 50% HNO 3 /15% H 2 O 2 (v/v)

steps.title: Take vials to dryness on a hotplate at 100-110˚C
steps.instruction: Take vials to dryness on a hotplate at 100-110˚C

steps.title: Resuspend sample in 200-500 µL of...
steps.instruction: Resuspend sample in 200-500 µL of 50% HNO 3 /15% H 2 O 2 (v/v). Cap loosely and heat at 110˚C.

steps.title: After vigorous bubbling cease, uncap vials and dry at 135˚C
steps.instruction: After vigorous bubbling cease, uncap vials and dry at 135˚C

steps.title: Add 100 µL concentrated HNO 3...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL concentrated HNO 3 and heat at 110˚C to dryness

steps.title: Dilute sample to 5% of original concentration with 0
steps.instruction: Dilute sample to 5% of original concentration with 0.1 M HNO 3 for analysis

steps.title: After concentration analysis, follow Conway et al
steps.instruction: After concentration analysis, follow Conway et al. (2013) to prepare samples for isotopic analysis.
